title: Megumi Ogata sama _
wikitext:
[]: Megumi Ogata-sama! ^_^             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 06, 2007 3:12 pm In honor of her Birthday today, let's discuss what were YOUR favorite roles by her and why? Or at the very least, did you think she portrayed Shinji well? Why or why not? I've only really seen her in SM as Haruka, that Princess in MKR, Yukito in CCS, and as Shinj, but I think she's a great voice actress. The fact that she has such a range is amazing, and she's a pretty good singer, imo. With Shinji, her voice acting was amazing. Those screams of the damned she pulled off throughout EoE.... *shudders* One moment I really like in that is when Misato is trying to get Shinji to pilot one last time, brillant voice-acting there, I think. Speaking of which, happy birthday, Shin-chan! ^__^ (He looks so silly here, I just had to post it.) *5 seconds after posting, this thread gets locked* T_T

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Wed Jun 06, 2007 3:16 pm Dear god, that Picture of Shinji is scary as hell. THIS AINT MIAMI VICE!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Kaminoyouni » Wed Jun 06, 2007 3:24 pm and he's reading "icha icha paradice" (jk)

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Wed Jun 06, 2007 3:27 pm she did a wonderful job on Shinji. after all, he is a pussy XD im just kidding. but without a good voice on the main character, i might've not even been drawn to Evangelion. It's sad how they put so much effort into their characters (EoE Shinji screams were amazing!), and yet don't get recognized very much, so I'd like say a very good job megumi and im lookin foreward to hearing you and seeing Shinji very soon!! BAAaaaAAAaaaAAAKA! =D

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jun 06, 2007 4:05 pm Heh, it's also my sister's birthday. And my aunt's birthday.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Jun 06, 2007 4:35 pm Ok, her screams are like... wow! She portrayed Shinji just perfect. I also liked her as Yukito in CCS.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Jun 06, 2007 5:52 pm Megumi Ogata is one of the few females who can believably sound like a teenage boy. Sure, there are a million others in anime who try to do it, but they always just end up sounding exactly like girls. Props to Megu.

[]:             Quote Post by Bean Bandit » Wed Jun 06, 2007 7:02 pm She was great as Yukito. There wasn't one bad seiyu in CCS.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 06, 2007 7:57 pm NAW-chan (I hearby dub that your nickname, lol): I love your newest avatar, please keep it for awhile! ;) His blinking...it's almost hyponictic. Yes... I agree with what Brik said, I haven't seen very many succesful female voices as anywhere from young men, adult men or women. (Or little "girly-men" in Shin-chan's case. ) In terms of roles I've seen her as, I forget to mention she was Akito in Kodomo no Omacha OVA. "You're so easy to please, Peggy!" "...Who's Peggy?" (Plus, she did a few other roles in SM besides Haruka-san, who appears in SMS. Little Mamoru in the SMR movie, a MoTD in the 1st Episode of SMR, and one of the Four Sisters in SMR's Black Moon Arc.) Anywho, in terms of her screaming, I'm suprirsed she didn't hurt her voice from doing so much. I think even Spike Spencer once said his voice was killing him afterwards. (though no offence to him, but his "screams" caused me to literally burst out laughing, despite being at such serious moments. :roll:) So, anybody out here (I'm looking at you Brik-kun, your nihongo is more leet than mine) know why she's credited sometimes as "Emi" instead of "Ogata"?? Are the Kanji somewhat similar?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jun 06, 2007 8:00 pm Very well, I shall keep the avatar. AH MADE IT MAHSELF, though I do so for almost all of my avatars. I would really love to see a video of Spike Spencer screaming during a recording session.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Wed Jun 06, 2007 8:40 pm NAveryW wrote: Very well, I shall keep the avatar. AH MADE IT MAHSELF, though I do so for almost all of my avatars. I would really love to see a video of Spike Spencer screaming during a recording session.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Jun 06, 2007 8:56 pm スターダストちゃん wrote: So, anybody out here (I'm looking at you Brik-kun, your nihongo is more leet than mine) know why she's credited sometimes as "Emi" instead of "Ogata"?? Are the Kanji somewhat similar?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Jun 07, 2007 6:46 am Major props to her doing Shinji so well. Definitely one of my favorite VA parts ever. Don't know if I've heard her in anything else though.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jun 07, 2007 2:27 pm Even if they can't bring back ALL the seiyuu for Webuild (though I doubt this is the case if they can bring them back for video games...Didn't they even reprise their roles in the Decative Evangelion game???), I really hope they at least bring back the "main ones": Ogata-sama, ARM... Imo, the seiyuu WERE their characters! btw, here's something interesting about I Need You's final (strangle) scene.Pointless triva proving truth is indeed stranger than fiction: Ogata REALLY strangled Yuko and nearly killed her! [url]http://www.akadot.com/article.php?a=31[/url] wrote: You are probably best known in the US for playing Shinji in "Evangelion." Some of Shinji's speeches sound like they might have been ad-libbed. Did you get to ad-lib and experiment when you were working on "Evangelion?" MO: I'm delighted that you think I sounded natural as if I was doing ad-libs. I don't remember doing anything experimental. There was a time when I actually pushed Yuko Miyamura to the floor to strangle her during the last scene of the "Evangelion" movie in which Shinji strangles Asuka. I couldn't act very well in playing that scene. I was so agitated that I strangled her too hard, making it impossible for her to say her lines for a while. Of course, I apologized to her for doing that. I almost killed her.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Thu Jun 07, 2007 6:11 pm that picture of Shinji is avatar material.
